releaseNotes: Completes the PenguPlay/Nuvio selected-source handoff through the real Details-screen playback route and adds a Binder-safe native playback launch. Preserves separate request/response headers, provider-ranked source order and the authoritative startup source, keeps direct playback first with bounded same-source MIME/proxy recovery before ordered failover, and strengthens seek proof (target reached and playback continues). Backend video relay stays off and standalone Vidlink stays disabled.
